description: Private account written by Nahray b. Nissim. Around 1060. A draft that was copied later. Mentions goods as textile and cloths. Seems like mentions debts for goods that were already paid back. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #290) VMR
description_he: חשבון פרטי של נהראי בן ניסים, כ-1060, טיוטה שהועתקה מאוחר יותר, על טקסטיל ובדים וחובות שנפרעו
